error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Touchline controller. Check the host address and try again.
error.no_devices: Connected to the controller but no thermostat zones were found.

abort.already_configured: This Touchline controller is already configured.

data.virtual_heat_mode: Enable virtual heat mode (heating/idle based on temperature)

data_description.virtual_heat_mode: When enabled, climate entities will show 'heating' when temperature is below target and 'idle' when temperature is above target, with hysteresis and delay for stability.
